flashcards.definition: Acid + Base → Salt + Water (HCl + NaOH → NaCl + H₂O).
An ionic compound formed from the cation of a base and the anion of an acid.
H⁺(aq) + OH⁻(aq) → H₂O(l) — the essence of neutralization.
A lab technique to determine the concentration of an acid or base using a known solution.
The point in a titration where moles of acid equal moles of base.
